data.title: Dart Mining Unveils High-Grade Results from Coonambula Project
data.description:
Great Divide Mining Ltd ( (AU:GDM) ) has issued an update.

Dart Mining NL has announced significant results from its surface and in situ vein sampling at the Coonambula Antimony-Gold Project in Central Queensland, a joint venture with Great Divide Mining. The sampling revealed high-grade antimony, gold, and silver, with antimony results reaching up to 65.3%, gold up to 17.0 g/t, and silver up to 97.9 g/t. These findings underscore the project’s potential, enhancing its prospectivity for these minerals and potentially impacting the company’s exploration strategy and stakeholder interests.

More about Great Divide Mining Ltd

Average Trading Volume: 37,719

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Sarytogan Graphite Limited Announces Virtual and In-Person AGM for November 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from Sarytogan Graphite Limited ( (AU:SGA) ).

Sarytogan Graphite Limited has announced its Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for November 13, 2025, which will be held both virtually and in-person. This meeting is significant for shareholders as it involves voting on key resolutions that could impact the company’s governance and strategic direction. The company has provided detailed instructions for shareholders to participate and vote, emphasizing the importance of their involvement in the decision-making process.

Sarytogan Graphite Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and production of graphite. The company is involved in developing graphite resources, which are essential for various industrial applications, including batteries and electronics.

data.title: InnoScience Announces New H Shares Placement to Raise Capital
data.description:
An announcement from InnoScience (Suzhou) Technology Holding Co Ltd Class H ( (HK:2577) ) is now available.

InnoScience (Suzhou) Technology Holding Co., Ltd. announced a new placement of 20,700,000 H Shares under a general mandate, with the Placing Agents agreeing to procure at least six placees to purchase the shares at HK$75.58 per share. This placement represents a strategic financial move, potentially raising approximately HK$1,550.425 million in net proceeds, which could enhance the company’s market positioning and provide additional capital for its operations.

data.title: Hydrix Limited Releases FY25 Audited Financial Statements with Revised Investment Valuation
data.description:
Hydrix Limited ( (AU:HYD) ) has provided an update.

Hydrix Limited has lodged its audited financial statements for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, after a delay due to an independent valuation report required by its auditor. The report led to a downward revision of the fair value of its investment in Wavewise Analytics Pty Ltd by $0.385 million, reflecting a new value of $0.375 million, compared to an initial investment of $0.50 million. This adjustment may impact stakeholders’ perception of Hydrix’s investment strategy and financial health.

More about Hydrix Limited

Hydrix Limited (ASX: HYD) is a technology innovation company focused on enhancing health, safety, and well-being through product innovation. The company designs, engineers, and delivers groundbreaking products, selectively invests in high-potential medtech clients, and distributes disruptive cardiovascular products.

Average Trading Volume: 362,011

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$6.27M

data.title: North Stawell Minerals Identifies High-Grade Gold Potential at Darlington Project
data.description:
An announcement from North Stawell Minerals, Ltd. ( (AU:NSM) ) is now available.

North Stawell Minerals Ltd has announced promising results from its exploration activities at the Darlington Project in Victoria, Australia. The company has identified high-grade gold potential through surface geochemistry and grab sampling, which have revealed significant gold anomalies. These findings support ongoing drilling efforts and enhance the understanding of the geochemical signature of mineralization in the area. The Darlington-Caledonia trend remains a key exploration focus, with the potential for high-grade mineralization, as indicated by recent drilling results and historical production data. The company’s continued exploration efforts aim to unlock further high-grade gold potential in this promising region.

More about North Stawell Minerals, Ltd.

North Stawell Minerals Ltd is a mining company focused on gold exploration in Victoria, Australia. The company operates in the gold industry, with a primary focus on exploring and developing gold deposits along the Darlington-Caledonia trend, leveraging advanced geochemical and drilling techniques.

Average Trading Volume: 188,451

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$11.71M

data.title: Horizon Robotics Completes Major Share Placement and Subscription
data.description:
The latest update is out from Horizon Robotics Class B ( (HK:9660) ).

Horizon Robotics has successfully completed the placing of 639,028,800 existing shares and a top-up subscription of new shares under a general mandate. The shares were placed at a price of HK$9.99 each to at least six independent third-party placees, ensuring no single placee became a substantial shareholder. This strategic move is expected to impact the company’s shareholding structure, potentially enhancing its market positioning and providing additional capital for future growth initiatives.

data.title: DigiCo Infrastructure REIT Announces Board Changes to Support Strategic Transformation
data.description:
Digico Infrastructure REIT ( (AU:DGT) ) has provided an announcement.

DigiCo Infrastructure REIT has announced changes to its board, with Michael Juniper appointed as a new director, effective immediately, and Chris Maher stepping down from his director role while continuing as CEO. These changes aim to maintain a balanced board and support DGT’s transformation into a leading data centre entity, with a focus on re-establishing majority independence over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:DGT) stock is a Buy with a A$4.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Digico Infrastructure REIT stock, see the AU:DGT Stock Forecast page.

More about Digico Infrastructure REIT

DigiCo Infrastructure REIT (DGT) is a diversified owner, operator, and developer of data centres with a global portfolio. The company has a broad investment mandate across Stabilised, Value-add, and Development opportunities, managing 13 data centres in key Australian and North American markets with a planned IT capacity of 238MW, including 76MW of installed IT capacity and a 162MW development pipeline.
